overview.zh: 颚式破碎机是一种高效率的初级破碎设备，主要用于矿山、冶金、建材、公路、铁路、水利和化工等行业的物料破碎。该设备破碎比大，产品粒度均匀，结构简单，工作可靠，维修方便，运营费用低。
overview.en: The Jaw Crusher is a high-efficiency primary crushing device mainly used for material crushing in mining, metallurgy, building materials, road, railway, water conservancy, and chemical industries. This equipment has a large crushing ratio, uniform product size, simple structure, reliable operation, easy maintenance, and low operating costs.

content.zh: 可按照客户需求进行定制
content.en: Can be customized according to customer requirements

description.zh: 广泛应用于建筑石料的初级破碎。
description.en: Widely used for primary crushing of construction aggregates.

description.zh: 适用于各类矿石的粗碎和中碎作业。
description.en: Suitable for coarse and medium crushing of various ores.

description.zh: 用于道路基础材料的制备和加工。
description.en: Used for preparation and processing of road base materials.

description.zh: 可用于建筑废料和混凝土废料的破碎和回收。
description.en: Can be used for crushing and recycling of construction waste and concrete waste.

features.zh: 采用高强度铸钢材料，抗冲击性能强
features.en: Made of high-strength cast steel material with strong impact resistance
Deep cavity crushing design, large processing capacity

features.zh: 易损件材质优良，使用寿命长
features.en: Excellent material for wear parts, long service life

features.zh: 结构简单紧凑，运行稳定可靠
features.en: Simple and compact structure, stable and reliable operation

features.zh: 维护保养方便，运营成本低
features.en: Easy maintenance and low operating costs

title.zh: 颚式破碎机 - 泽鑫矿山设备 | 高效初级破碎设备
title.en: Jaw Crusher - Zexin Mining Equipment | High-Efficiency Primary Crushing

description.zh: 颚式破碎机是一种高效的初级破碎设备，具有破碎比大、产品粒度均匀、结构简单、操作方便等特点，广泛应用于矿山、冶金、建筑等行业。
description.en: The Jaw Crusher is a high-efficiency primary crushing equipment with features like large crushing ratio, uniform product size, simple structure, and easy operation, widely used in mining, metallurgy, construction and other industries.

keywords.zh: 颚式破碎机,初级破碎,矿山设备,破碎机,泽鑫矿山,矿石破碎,建筑材料破碎
keywords.en: jaw crusher,primary crushing,mining equipment,crusher,Zexin Mining,ore crushing,construction material crushing

warranty.zh: 泽鑫矿山设备为所有颚式破碎机提供12个月的标准保修期，并提供延长保修服务选项。我们的全球售后团队确保及时响应和解决设备问题。
warranty.en: Zexin Mining Equipment offers a standard 12-month warranty for all jaw crushers, with extended warranty options available. Our global after-sales team ensures timely response and resolution of equipment issues.
